English Description:
The details of the major shareholders' status have not been tagged.

Please provide detailed tagging of the status of major shareholders. * If there is only one major shareholder, even if the data content is normal, it may be identified as an exception and a warning (attention) may be displayed.
Logic:
There should be facts existing using one of:

http://disclosure.edinet-fsa.go.jp/role/jpcrp/...:
rol_std_MajorShareholders-01
rol_std_MajorShareholders-02
rol_MajorShareholders-01
rol_MajorShareholders-02
Regulator Provided Validation Message: 大株主の状況の詳細タグ付けがされて いません。
Regulator Provided Solution Message: 大株主の状況の詳細タグ付けをしてくだ さい。 ※大株主が一名の場合は、データ内容が正 常であっても、例外と識別され、警告（注 意喚起）が表示される場合があります。

English Description:
The consolidated balance sheet details have not been tagged.

Please provide detailed tagging of the consolidated balance sheet. If you do not provide a consolidated balance sheet, please confirm that the "Consolidated Financial Statements" field in the DEI information is correct.
Logic:
Concept Name: WhetherConsolidatedFinancialStatementsArePreparedDEI and AccountingStandardsDEI
Conditions: If WhetherConsolidatedFinancialStatementsArePreparedDEI is TRUE and AccountingStandardsDEI is "Japan GAAP", then a BS must exist using one of:

http://disclosure.edinet-fsa.go.jp/role/jppfs/...:
rol_ConsolidatedBalanceSheet
rol_std_ConsolidatedBalanceSheet
rol_SemiAnnualConsolidatedBalanceSheet
rol_std_SemiAnnualConsolidatedBalanceSheet
rol_Type1SemiAnnualConsolidatedBalanceSheet
rol_std_Type1SemiAnnualConsolidatedBalanceSheet
rol_QuarterlyConsolidatedBalanceSheet
rol_std_QuarterlyConsolidatedBalanceSheet
Regulator Provided Validation Message: 連結貸借対照表の詳細タグ付けがされ ていません。
Regulator Provided Solution Message: 連結貸借対照表の詳細タグ付けをしてく ださい。 連結貸借対照表を記載しない場合は、DEI 情報の「連結決算の有無」が正しいことを 確認してください。
